pois.name: What Stage
pois.desc: The big one — main stage on the SE bowl. Headliners: Skrillex, The Strokes, RÜFÜS DU SOL, Noah Kahan.

pois.name: Which Stage
pois.desc: Second stage, south-central Centeroo. Kesha closes it Sunday.

pois.name: This Tent
pois.desc: Pavilion on the west tree line. Kesha's SuperJam Saturday, Modest Mouse Sunday.

pois.name: That Tent
pois.desc: Moved into the What Stage field for 2026 (first time ever) — location approximate.

pois.name: The Other
pois.desc: EDM superstructure, NW field. Sunrise sets Friday & Saturday nights.

pois.name: Where Stage
pois.desc: The UFO — moved inside Centeroo for '26. Late-night Fri & Sat only. Location approximate.

pois.name: Bonnaroo Fountain
pois.desc: The classic mushroom fountain — center of Centeroo and the best meetup spot on the Farm.

pois.name: Clock Tower & Ferris Wheel
pois.desc: By the Tower Entrance on the north edge (approx.).

pois.name: Planet Roo
pois.desc: Community hub: The Academy, Snake & Jake's, Bonnaroots (approx.).

pois.name: The Oasis & waterslide
pois.desc: Cool-off zone near The Other, with the Big Ass Waterslide (approx.).

pois.name: The Arch (NE entrance)
pois.desc: Main pedestrian entrance under the rainbow arch. Wristband help + lockers + merch nearby.

pois.name: Tower Entrance (N)
pois.desc: North pedestrian entrance at the Clock Tower.

pois.name: Area 931 Entrance (SW)
pois.desc: Southwest pedestrian entrance to Centeroo (approx.).

pois.name: East Toll & rideshare
pois.desc: Vehicle gate via Shedd Rd. Rideshare drop-off: 2465 New Bushy Branch Rd.

pois.name: West Toll
pois.desc: NW vehicle gate off New Bushy Branch Rd (approx.).

pois.name: Water refill — Tower
pois.desc: Free filtered water by the Tower Entrance / Ferris wheel (approx.).

pois.name: Water refill — Fountain
pois.desc: Free filtered water just east of the Fountain (approx.).

pois.name: Water refill — Oasis
pois.desc: Free filtered water near The Oasis / The Other (approx.). Every Outeroo Plaza has one too.

pois.name: Medical — What/Which
pois.desc: 24/7 medical between What and Which stages (approx.). Flag any staff or SafeFest yellow shirt.

pois.name: Medical — This Tent
pois.desc: Medical near the GA+ Lounge by This Tent (approx.).

pois.name: Medical — Arch/VIP
pois.desc: Medical near the Arch Entrance / VIP area (approx.). Every Plaza also has 24-hr medical.

pois.name: Vendor Village
pois.desc: Main food row between the Fountain and Which Stage (approx.).

pois.name: Merch & lockers
pois.desc: Main merch, Rootique and rental lockers w/ charging, near the Arch (approx.).

pois.name: Bonnie Roo's Brews & Sports Bar
pois.desc: New for '26, in That Tent's old spot on the north edge (approx.).

pois.name: Restrooms — What Stage
pois.desc: Restroom + food cluster at the What field edge (approx.). Every stage has one nearby.

pois.name: Restrooms — Which Stage
pois.desc: Restroom cluster near Which Stage (approx.).

pois.name: Restrooms — This Tent
pois.desc: Restroom cluster near This Tent / GA+ (approx.).

pois.name: Restrooms — The Other
pois.desc: Restroom cluster near The Other (approx.).

pois.name: Charging & lockers
pois.desc: Locker rentals with battery-pack swaps near the Arch (approx.). Free charging at every Plaza.

pois.name: Coca-Cola Refresh Lounge
pois.desc: Shaded lounge between Which Stage and the Fountain, with water refill (approx.).

pois.name: The Woods
pois.desc: Shaded wooded camping east of Centeroo.

pois.name: Plaza 1
pois.desc: Free water, 24-hr medical & security, showers, charging, Wi-Fi (location approx.).

pois.name: Plaza 2
pois.desc: Free water, 24-hr medical & security, showers, charging, Wi-Fi (location approx.). Home of the Why? Barn stage.

pois.name: Plaza 3
pois.desc: Free water, 24-hr medical & security, showers, charging, Wi-Fi (location approx.). Home of the When? Barn stage.

pois.name: Plaza 4
pois.desc: Free water, 24-hr medical & security, showers, charging, Wi-Fi (location approx.).

pois.name: Plaza 5
pois.desc: Free water, 24-hr medical & security, showers, charging, Wi-Fi (location approx.). Home of the Groop stage.

pois.name: Plaza 6
pois.desc: Free water, 24-hr medical & security, showers, charging, Wi-Fi (location approx.). Community camps cluster here.

pois.name: Plaza 7
pois.desc: Free water, 24-hr medical & security, showers, charging, Wi-Fi (location approx.). The Grove premium camping nearby.

pois.name: Plaza 8
pois.desc: Free water, 24-hr medical & security, showers, charging, Wi-Fi (location approx.).

pois.name: Plaza 9
pois.desc: Free water, 24-hr medical & security, showers, charging, Wi-Fi (location approx.). Home of the Silent Disco.

pois.name: General Store (east)
pois.desc: Ice, water, beer, food, sundries — near Plaza 3 (approx.).

pois.name: General Store (west)
pois.desc: Ice, water, beer, food, sundries — near Plaza 4 (approx.).

pois.name: SoloRoo
pois.desc: Community camp for solo travelers (approx.).

pois.name: SoberRoo
pois.desc: Sober community camp (approx.).

pois.name: FamilyRoo
pois.desc: Family camping (approx.).

pois.name: The Beyond
pois.desc: Community camp (approx.).

pois.name: Rideshare lot
pois.desc: Pickup/drop-off outside the East Toll — 2465 New Bushy Branch Rd.

pois.name: Day Parking
pois.desc: West Toll corridor. Opens 11 AM, no in-and-out (approx.).

pois.name: Old Highway Toll
pois.desc: SW vehicle gate off US-41 (approx.).
